title: ‘I was fed opium’: What man behind Delhi Assembly breach told cops
content: A man, Sarabjit Singh, was apprehended in Delhi after a security breach at the Assembly, claiming he was searching for his missing nephew and was given opium. His family provided psychiatric treatment documents, asserting his innocence. Police are corroborating his narrative of a road trip for prayers and the missing child.

title: Farther than ever before: Astronauts witness solar eclipse during Artemis II’s daring moon flyby
content: Artemis II astronauts achieved a historic milestone, reaching a record 252,756 miles from Earth during a lunar flyby. The crew experienced a rare solar eclipse and observed the Moon's far side. This mission marks a significant step in NASA's lunar exploration goals.

title: 'Could be taken out in one night': Trump threatens Iran; vows to jail F-15 'leak' source
content: As a 48-hour deadline for Iran approaches, President Trump warned the nation could be "taken out in one night." He detailed a complex rescue operation for two downed airmen, involving over 170 US military aircraft and facing close-range gunfire. Trump also vowed to identify a source who leaked details of the operation, citing national security concerns.

title: ‘Never ever seen anything like this’: Virat Kohli left stunned by Dhurandhar 2
content: Cricket star Virat Kohli lauded the recently released film Dhurandhar 2 as an unparalleled Indian cinematic experience, praising director Aditya Dhar and lead Ranveer Singh's brilliant performance. The blockbuster has achieved immense success, grossing over ₹1622 crore worldwide. Actor Anushka Sharma also commended the film's gripping storytelling and meticulous craftsmanship.

title: Oracle hires new CFO after layoffs; says demand for AI, cloud rising
content: Oracle has initiated a new week by appointing Hilary Maxson as its new Chief Financial Officer, following recent widespread layoffs. This move comes as the software giant invests heavily in AI infrastructure, taking on significant debt. Maxson, with extensive financial experience, aims to ensure disciplined investment for customer and shareholder value amidst Oracle's ambitious cloud and AI expansion plans.

title: Shocking! Umpire stabbed to death over run-out decision in local cricket match
content: A local cricket umpire, Dola Ajith Babu, was tragically stabbed to death in Visakhapatnam following a dispute over a run-out decision. The incident escalated when a spectator, allegedly under the influence of alcohol, attacked Babu and another umpire after an earlier argument was settled. Babu succumbed to his injuries despite efforts to save him.

title: Canada has changed Immigration rules; changing Visa fee, work permit rules and more
content: Canada's immigration landscape is shifting from April 2026 with passport and citizenship fee increases, offset by a 30-day processing guarantee. Super visa rules are relaxed, allowing sponsors more flexibility. Provinces gain increased autonomy in immigration assessments, while rural employers benefit from expanded foreign worker quotas.

title: Oil prices rise as Trump’s Hormuz threat looms; WTI hits $113, Brent climbs to $110
content: Oil prices surged Tuesday as Middle East tensions escalated.  US President Trump issued a stern warning to Iran regarding the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has effectively closed.  Disruptions to this vital shipping lane are impacting global crude markets, with refiners scrambling for alternatives.  Regional conflicts also continue to fuel instability.

title: Air India CEO Campbell Wilson resigns amid mounting losses
content: Air India's CEO, Campbell Wilson, has stepped down following significant losses and a slow recovery since the Tata Group's acquisition. His departure, accepted by the board, awaits a successor and the conclusion of the investigation into last year's Ahmedabad crash. Wilson's tenure, which began in July 2022, faced challenges including supply chain issues and airspace restrictions.

title: Apple may have a plan to 'ensure' you do not pay more for iPhone 18 series
content: Apple is reportedly planning to absorb rising component costs for the upcoming iPhone 18 series, leveraging its financial strength to maintain stable pricing. This strategy aims to secure supply and gain market share amidst global component shortages and price volatility, potentially impacting competitors' availability and pricing.

title: 'Difficult to keep him out of Indian team': Karthik sends message to selectors on RCB batter
content: Padikkal played a key role in RCB’s win over Chennai Super Kings on Sunday, scoring 50 off 29 balls. Speaking after the match, Karthik pointed to Padikkal’s approach at the start of the innings.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ box office day 19: Film eyes Rs 1,630 crore collection worldwide
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' is nearing the Rs 1,630 crore worldwide box office mark, despite a significant drop on its 19th day. The film, which crossed Rs 1,000 crore domestically, collected Rs 10 crore on Monday, April 6, 2026, bringing its total to Rs 1,023.77 crore in India and Rs 1,622.72 crore globally.

title: Kittle linked to Cowboys move as 49ers eye $5M defensive upgrade
content: Jadeveon Clowney is a highly rated edge defender. He last played for the Dallas Cowboys. He is a potential target for the San Francisco 49ers. Their roster has injured players and the farewell of Bryce Huff. Clowney’s beyond impressive 2025 stats and PFF grades could bolster the Niners’ weakest in the league pass rush. However, he told KPRC 2 that he wants a reunion with Lamar Jackson in Baltimore.

title: Mahomes gets boost as KC Current star returns amid injury recovery
content: Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes received a timely boost as KC Current star Temwa Chawinga returned from injury. The reigning MVP’s comeback comes during a tough stretch, offering hope to end a losing streak. Her presence could quickly restore form and energy ahead of a crucial matchup against Gotham FC.

title: Rory McIlroy marriage drama deepens as book reveals divorce twist
content: Rory McIlroy’s short-lived divorce from Erica Stoll in 2024 drew huge attention, especially with Amanda Balionis rumors. A new book by Alan Shipnuck shares inside details, but confirms no affair. The couple reunited within a month, calling it a “wake-up call.” Despite personal challenges, McIlroy continues to focus on golf with family support.

title: Bengal polls roll revision: 27 lakh ‘doubtful’ voters may lose voting rights
content: Nearly 27 lakh voters in West Bengal face exclusion from the electoral roll as their claims were rejected by judicial officers. The Supreme Court has ruled against the inclusion of names pending appeals, citing the burden on tribunals and potential chaos. Deletions now stand at 88.8 lakh, impacting 11.6% of the electorate.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Buffalo Bills eye $132 mn Pittsburgh Steelers Star
content: The Buffalo Bills strengthened their offense by trading for DJ Moore, but questions remain about their receiving depth. With Super Bowl expectations rising, analysts suggest Buffalo could pursue DK Metcalf if he becomes available. Contract concerns and recent production have fueled trade speculation around Metcalf, though a deal is far from certain. For the Bills, adding another elite receiver could elevate Josh Allen and the offense to another level. The decision now is whether one bold move is enough, or if a second could truly push Buffalo into championship territory.

title: Tata Sons’ new ventures may post Rs 29,000 crore loss in FY26: Report
content: Tata Sons' new ventures face mounting losses, with projections for FY26 reaching Rs 29,000 crore. This sharp increase has raised concerns, impacting leadership decisions. Tata Digital and Air India are major contributors to these losses. A plan to control spending is expected soon. The group is reassessing strategies for these ambitious projects.

title: Army gets delivery of 'hundreds of kamikaze drones' from Gujarat firm under emergency purchase
content: An Indian drone company has supplied hundreds of kamikaze drones to the Indian Army. The Rs 10 crore contract was fulfilled rapidly. These drones are designed for harsh environments and feature automated navigation. This delivery highlights the government's focus on domestic manufacturers for precision unmanned systems.

title: Delhi assembly car breach exposes major security lapses; high-level probe ordered
content: A major security breach at the Delhi Assembly has exposed significant lapses in the security apparatus, with a car ramming through a closed gate. Experts are puzzled by the clean exit of the driver, a 'non-professional' man, despite heavy CRPF and Delhi Police deployment.

title: Jaishankar to Iran's FM Araghchi: Back efforts to stop war
content: India's External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar discussed West Asia's stability with his Iranian counterpart, emphasizing support for regional peace efforts. Conversations with Qatar and the UAE also touched upon military escalation and its security implications. Iran highlighted alleged "heinous crimes" by "aggressors," while Qatar urged an end to "unjustified Iranian attacks" and stressed de-escalation.

title: Japanese tourist molested near Jaipur's Jaigarh Fort, FIR lodged but no arrests yet
content: Five youths are accused of sexually harassing a Japanese tourist near Jaigarh Fort in Jaipur. The group allegedly pushed the woman, held her, and attempted to kiss her before fleeing when she raised the alarm and a security guard approached. An FIR has been registered, but no arrests have been made.

title: IPL 2026: Punjab Kings go top after rain washes out KKR vs PBKS clash at Eden Gardens
content: Kolkata Knight Riders secured their first point in IPL 2026 after their match against Punjab Kings was abandoned due to rain. The game was called off after just 22 deliveries with KKR at 25 for 2. Punjab Kings now lead the table with five points from three games.

title: Jammu man lured into Russian job and sent to war zone killed
content: A 23-year-old Jammu man, Sachin Khajuria, who went to Russia for a job, was sent to the frontlines of the Russia-Ukraine war and has now been cremated after his death was confirmed. He is the second from Jammu to die in the conflict, with families alleging youths were duped by agents promising civilian jobs but were forced into the army.

title: No dude left behind: Trump toots US success while warning Iran 'surrender or else…'
content: US President Trump issued a stark warning to Iran, threatening further destruction if they don't capitulate by his deadline. Amidst growing domestic unease about a potential quagmire, the US conducted a complex rescue mission for a downed airman, involving advanced technology and significant financial costs. Iran's claims of capturing personnel were disputed by US officials.

title: 'Useless would be understatement': Green faces fan fury after another flop show
content: After choosing to bat first, KKR lost Finn Allen and Cameron Green early. They were 25 for 2 in 3.4 overs when rain stopped play, with captain Ajinkya Rahane and Angkrish Raghuvanshi at the crease.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Houston Texans eye $5M former Cleveland Browns star CB
content: The Houston Texans had a rocky start in the last season but recorded a pretty strong performance later as it ended the season with 12 wins and just 5 losses, sparking shockwaves. The 2025 season marked one of the most successful seasons in the history of the Houston Texans but the team witnessed a brutal loss to the New England Patriots in the Divisional Round. Ahead of the new season, it seems the team is fully focused on working on their roster.

title: Horoscope today: Daily astrological predictions for April 7
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for April 7, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: All the Rakai drama from MrBeast’s $1,000,000 streamer event you need to know
content: MrBeast's million-dollar streamer challenge saw YourRAGE claim the top prize. However, contestant Rakai's on-stage outburst after elimination and subsequent online dispute with El Rubius fans created significant drama. Security was called to remove Rakai. This controversy, alongside the competition, made the event highly memorable for viewers. The incident highlighted the intense pressure faced by participants.

title: 'Will continue war ...': Iran rejects temporary truce; sets conditions for talks
content: Iran has finalised its demands for ending the conflict with the US and Israel, rejecting a temporary truce. Tehran conveyed its requirements through intermediaries, deeming earlier US proposals "excessive and illogical." Iran insists on a permanent end to hostilities, not a pause that allows adversaries to regroup.

title: Avesh Khan ball-hitting row: SRH likely to approach BCCI over 'unfair play' in IPL
content: The issue concerns the last ball of the game on April 5, when LSG captain Rishabh Pant hit a boundary off Jaydev Unadkat. As the ball was heading towards the boundary, Avesh, who was near the dugout, struck it back into the ground with a bat.

title: Elliotte Friedman hints at Maple Leafs’ big offseason call on Auston Matthews
content: NHL insider Elliotte Friedman suggests the Toronto Maple Leafs may delay a decision on Auston Matthews' future until the start of next season. This approach mirrors the Vancouver Canucks' handling of Quinn Hughes, allowing the team to assess its performance before making significant roster adjustments. Matthews' contract includes a no-movement clause, giving him considerable control over any potential trade.

title: Defiance or sabotage? What AAP's move in Kerala signals for Congress in assembly polls
content: Aam Aadmi Party's decision to contest all seats in Kerala assembly polls creates a new challenge for Congress. This move mirrors AAP's impact in Gujarat, where it reduced Congress's vote share. AAP's presence could alter the political landscape, potentially benefiting the ruling Left. The INDIA bloc faces internal friction as AAP expands its national footprint.

title: Wemby leaves Spurs' victory due to bruised rib
content: The Spurs ruled out Victor Wembanyama for the second half of Monday's win against the 76ers because of a left rib contusion.

title: Grizzlies tie NBA mark for 3s with 29 but still lose
content: The Grizzlies tied the NBA single-game record with 29 3-pointers on Monday but still lost 142-126 at home to the Cavaliers.

title: Sources: UNC to hire Malone as new hoops coach
content: North Carolina intends to hire former longtime NBA coach Michael Malone as the school's next basketball coach, sources told ESPN.

title: Sky trade Reese to Dream for two 1st-rounders
content: The Sky have traded two-time WNBA All-Star and two-time rebounding champ Angel Reese to the Dream for first-round draft picks in 2027 and 2028.

title: Lady Vols lose recruit Edwards, see roster cut to 1
content: On the same day that Tennessee guard Jaida Civil announced she's entering the transfer portal, Oliviyah Edwards, the No. 2 recruit in the SC Next 100 class of 2026, requested a release from her national letter of intent with the Lady Volunteers on Monday.

title: Bulls fire Karnisovas, GM Eversley after 6 seasons
content: The Chicago Bulls have fired executive vice president of basketball operations Arturas Karnisovas and general manager Marc Eversley.

title: Scherzer exits after 2 with forearm tendinitis
content: Blue Jays right-hander and three-time Cy Young Award winner Max Scherzer left Monday's 14-2 loss to the Dodgers because of right forearm tendinitis.

title: Stars ban buyer of tix tied to alleged Nazi salute
content: The Stars have indefinitely banned the fan who purchased the tickets in connection with an investigation into what appeared to be a Nazi salute at a game in December.

title: MLS Power Rankings: LAFC are practically perfect atop the table
content: LAFC still hasn't conceded in league play in 2026, only a draw blemishes its record this season, but it's enough to top ESPN's MLS Power Rankings.

content: Chiles and Chio continued their superstar ways. Oklahoma, Florida and LSU dominated. After NCAA gymnastics regionals, the final eight teams are set.

content: Set to be a first-round cornerback in the NFL draft like his brother, Avieon Terrell has looked to A.J. as his inspiration throughout his life.

content: Manchester City midfielder Bernardo Silva is set to leave this summer and has Barcelona and Juventus on his trail. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Strait Of Hormuz Closure Could Soon Be Felt On Dinner Tables Worldwide
content: Three staple crops  corn, wheat and rice  supply more than half of the world's dietary calories. The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has reduced the supply and increased the cost of all three.

title: Iran Calls For Human Chains Around Power Plants As Trump's Hormuz Deadline Nears
content: Trump has expanded his threat against Iran to include all power plants and bridges as his ultimatum to make a deal ticked closer.

title: IMF Cuts Global Growth Outlook As Iran War Chokes Oil, Flags Inflation Risk
content: Even if the Iran war ends quickly, the IMF expects to cut growth forecasts and raise inflation projections.

content: The AGP was born out of the Assam Agitation, a popular six-year-long student-led movement against illegal immigration.

content: Officials said the sender also issued a warning that the grandson of an influential politician from Tamil Nadu would be kidnapped.

title: India's Most Advanced Atomic Reactor Reaches Milestone, Attains Criticality
content: Criticality refers to the point at which a reactor achieves a self-sustaining nuclear fission reaction, where the number of neutrons produced is sufficient to keep the reaction going without external intervention

title: Delhi Records 33.3 Degrees Celsius, Yellow Alert Issued For 2 Days
content: The change in weather conditions is attributed to shifting wind patterns and the influence of a western disturbance, which is likely to bring intermittent cloud cover and isolated rainfall over the national capital region.

title: Ukraine's Zelensky Says He Stands By Ceasefire Proposal To Russia
content: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said on Monday that he stood by a proposal made to Russia for a ceasefire contingent on Moscow halting all attacks on energy infrastructure.

title: Artemis II Astronauts Regain Contact With NASA After 40-Minute Blackout
content: NASA mission control in Houston regained communications with Artemis astronauts traveling around the Moon after an expected blackout that lasted some 40 minutes.

title: Woman Arrested At Lucknow Metro Station With Live Cartridges
content: A 43-year-old woman was arrested at the Badshahnagar Metro Station here, after live cartridges were recovered from her possession, police said on Monday.

title: "Don't Care About Critics": Trump On Expletive-Laded Post Against Iran
content: US President Donald Trump brushed off criticism of his expletive-laden references to causing destruction in Iran if they failed to make a deal to end the war.

title: "I Am A Businessman First": Trump Eyes Iran Oil As War Expands
content: President Donald Trump has said the United States could take control of Iranian oil resources as part of the outcome of the ongoing conflict, framing it as a potential economic return for military action.

content: Iran War: Trump, who has threatened to bomb Iran's power plants and bridges, also said he believed Iranians "would be willing to suffer that in order to have freedom."

content: Trump said US authorities would go directly to the media organisation that published the story and demand the identity of the source.

content: a shooting star was sitting in a bar when the idea came to him . he watched the television over the bar as Larry Bird's Boston Celtics ran over another unfortunate opponent . his other eye was affixed on the waitress who served him that drink .

content: UCLA took home its first women's NCAA championship in program history on Sunday . a 79-51 win over south Carolina will mark a bittersweet yet joyful moment . the 2026 edition of the college basketball masterpiece sets it apart from other tournaments .

content: Mikel Arteta's side are just five victories from success in the two competitions it has become so desperate to win: the Premier League and Champions League . the gunners lost 2-1 to Southampton in the FA Cup quarterfinals on saturday . artet awoke on Sunday with the UEFA Champions League quarterfinal first leg on the horizon .

title: Masters 2026: Ranking all 91 players in the field
content: for the first time in his career, Rory McIlroy will drive down Magnolia Lane this week as a Masters champion . a year ago, he made a 4-foot birdie putt on the 18th hole to defeat england's Justin Rose on the first hole of a sudden-death playoff . with his long-awaited Masters victory, Mcilroy became only the sixth golfer to complete the career Grand Slam .

title: Michigan holds off UConn late to claim second men's NCAA title
content: INDIANAPOLIS -- The Michigan Wolverines ended the Big Ten's 26-year men's basketball championship drought on Monday, leading much of their title bout against UConn before winning 69-63 to end the Huskies' quest for a third title in four seasons. ESPN college basketball reporters were on-site to track all the action alongside editors across the country.

content: Jayakanthan’s novella, “Cinemavukku Pona Chitthalu,” explores the impact of film culture on identity and social dynamics through the story of Kamsalai, a devoted admirer of Tamil cinema icon M.G. Ramachandran (MGR). Set in Chennai, the narrative captures a time when MGR’s influence shaped Tamil Nadu’s political landscape.

title: It may not be an overwhelming win, but Congress is clearly ahead in Kerala: Shashi Tharoor

title: Three educationists rapped by Supreme Court over NCERT chapter seek hearing
content: Government informs the court about the constitution of an expert committee comprising former apex court judge Justice (retired) Indu Malhotra, senior advocate KK Venugopal and Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University vice chancellor Prakash Singh, to finalise the NCERT curriculum on Legal Studies for Class 8 and other grades.

title: ‘New’ Bangladesh-India ties will avoid ‘mistakes of the past’: Foreign Affairs Adviser Humayun Kobir
content: The Foreign Affairs Adviser to Bangladesh Prime Minister Tarique Rahman says the two sides should do more frequent exchanges at the level of political parties and officials to deal with ‘difficult issues’ so that misunderstandings are avoided.

title: Supreme Court directs CBI to probe ‘contracts awarded’ to Arunachal Pradesh CM Pema Khandu’s family
content: Petitioners alleged that there was rampant corruption, nepotism and dispensing with a transparent and open tender system in the award of contracts for 10 years between January 2015 till December 31, 2025

title: PM Modi hails BJP workers battling ‘hostile conditions’
content: Prime Minister pays tribute to workers who sacrificed their lives in line of duty; says party is addressing challenges such as demographic shifts, illegal infiltration, corruption, dynastic politics

title: In Bihar, the prohibition law has become a joke, says Tejashwi Yadav
content: Leader of Opposition in Bihar Assembly Tejashwi Yadav alleged that an illegal parallel liquor economy worth nearly ₹40,000 crore has emerged under the policy

title: Ahead of poll day, Election Commission issues directive on political advertisements
content: Individuals or contesting candidates can apply for certification of advertisements with District Media Certification and Monitoring Committee

title: Kejriwal appears in person before HC to plead change of Bench in excise case; SG terms it ‘theatrics’
content: Justice Sharma took Mr. Kejriwal's application for her recusal on record and listed it for hearing on April 13

title: NIA team reaches Malda to probe gherao of judicial officials engaged in SIR
content: The NIA has been tasked by the Election Commission to probe into the Wednesday (April 1) incident, following a directive from the Supreme Court, which has censured the West Bengal administration over the issue.

title: SC asks PMK founder Ramadoss to move HC against Chennai court order
content: Dr. Ramadoss is engaged in a dispute over the use of the party symbol by his estranged son and party president Anbumani

title: Prominent candidates file nomination papers, set out to canvass votes
content: While AIADMK’s Valarmathi filed nomination papers for Thousand Lights, DMK’s Ma. Subramanian held campaign in Saidapet

title: Familiar foes trying to recover lost ground in southern districts of T.N.
content: The AIADMK is facing a two-pronged attack from its former coordinator O. Panneerselvam and former interim general secretary V.K. Sasikala; while the former, now with the DMK, has addressed 40 meetings in the southern region, the latter, who now heads the AIPTMMK, will begin her tour today

title: Deve Gowda, HDK, Chalavadi joined hands with BJP for their own political existence, says Chief Minister Siddaramaiah
content: Chief Minister Siddaramaiah on Monday said that former Prime Minister H.D. Deve Gowda, ex chief minister H.D. Kumaraswamy and leader of opposition in legislative council Chalavadi Narayanaswamy who had openly criticised RSS and Prime Minister Narendra Modi earlier, had now joined hands with BJP just to save their existence.

title: T.N. Assembly election: Why aren’t you implementing the  Centre’s schemes, Piyush Goyal questions M.K. Stalin
content: He alleges that Tamil Nadu has been deprived of development under the leadership of the current Chief Minister

title: T.N. Assembly election: Palaniswami, Duraimurugan, among those who filed their nominations on the final day
content: Union Minister and former president of BJP’s State unit L. Murugan files his nomination from Avanashi constituency. TNCC president K. Selvaperunthagai files his papers from Sriperumbudur

title: From myths to language: examining the renaming of Kerala
content: The Union Government’s recent approval of the proposal to rename Kerala as Keralam prompts a re-examination of the term’s historicity, including its founding legend, the context of the United Kerala Movement, and arguments for the linguistic purity of ‘Keralam’

title: ‘Government’s semiconductor mission will promote research’: MeitY Additional Secretary
content: Though India accounts for nearly 20% of the world’s semiconductor design engineers, it doesn’t have its own design firms, says Amitesh Kumar Sinha, Additional Secretary, Electronics and IT Ministry, at the The Hindu Deep Tech Summit; the India Semiconductor Mission 2.0 will expand beyond the first phase to include research and development, equipment manufacturing and skilling, he adds

title: West Bengal SIR hearing Updates: Supreme Court directs NIA to take over investigation
content: Pendency in courts rising in State because judicial officers were diverted for SIR, says CJI; Supreme Court directs verified names to be included in supplementary list 'by tonight'

title: Church vandalised in Odisha over allegations of sexual assault
content: A visually impaired girl had allegedly become pregnant after being sexually assaulted months ago by a man from the Christian community

title: Leaders call for convergence and collaboration at The Hindu Deep Tech Summit
content: The academia must embrace failure as part of the process and industry should step in to guide ideas toward real-world outcomes, say experts

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: UDF ramps up challenge in Palakkad, targets LDF strongholds
content: At least six constituencies -- Palakkad, Thrithala, Pattambi, Ottapalam, Kongad and Malampuzha -- are witnessing keenly contested battles, with Palakkad emerging as the fiercest

title: T.N. Assembly election: CPI(M) manifesto pitches electoral reforms, State autonomy, and pro-labour measures
content: It also calls for a complete ban on corporate donations to political parties and opposes the privatisation of public sector undertakings

title: West Bengal SIR: Supreme Court declines Bengal’s plea to delay voter roll freeze
content: The top court says tribunal hearings cannot be “compressed” and made hasty to fit a deadline; CJI says gheraoing of judicial officers on April 1 was a ‘well-planned, calculated and deeply instigated’ move

title: Take up the challenge, work hard: Prof. Ashok Jhunjhunwala word of advice to youngsters
content: The session, titled “From Lab to Nation: How India Can Build A Global Deep Tech Ecosystem”, covered Professor Jhunjhunwala’s return to India in the 1980s, the key principles behind the success of IIT Madras Research Park, and more

title: NFL draft QB Hot Board: Reid on strengths and weaknesses for the top 12 passers
content: the 2026 draft kicks off April 23 in Pittsburgh . scouts and front office personnel have compiled a list of the best quarterbacks . the list goes 12 deep and includes info on each passer's draft stock . it's time to lock in my quarterback rankings .
